description: L2 decision whose Gate 1 business driver is inferred from an L1 in the same source
source:
Users can export their data as CSV at any time. [L1 — already classified]

Export runs as a Sidekiq background job to keep response times under 200ms for large datasets.
rationale: The Sidekiq decision fails Gate 1 in isolation (no named business driver in the sentence itself). But the same source contains an L1: 'Users can export data as CSV at any time.' The L1 provides the business tie. Gate 1 passes via inferred driver. Gate 2 passes: alternatives exist (sync export, streaming, Lambda job). Route: proposed with note 'business tie inferred from L1'.
